message.content:
@startuml
skinparam UMLClassBoxStyle fillcolor: #f5f5f5
skinparam UMLActorBoxStyle fillcolor: #f5f5f5
skinparam UMLClassBoxStyle borderStyle: solid
skinparam UMLActorBoxStyle borderStyle: solid

class client {
    label "client"
    rect fill: #f5f5f5
}

class Component {
    label "Component"
    rect fill: #f5f5f5
    section
    void add()
    void remove()
    void print()
    section
}

class leaf {
    label "leaf"
    rect fill: #f5f5f5
}

class Composite {
    label "Composite"
    rect fill: #f5f5f5
    section
    void add()
    void remove()
    section
}

component client --> Component : <<inherit>>
component Component --> leaf : <<inherit>>
component Component --> Composite : <<inherit>>
component Composite --> Component : <<inherit>>

@enduml
